name: memory-os
description: Consolidated Knowledge OS for the studio — kernel (ai-loadout) + memories (claude-memories) + rules (claude-rules) + the runtime loadout hook, under one npm-workspaces root.
author: mcp-tool-shop

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/kernel && npm run build -w packages/memories && npm run build -w packages/rules
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/kernel && npm run test -w packages/memories && npm run test -w packages/rules
scripts.verify: npm run build && npm run verify -w packages/kernel && npm run verify -w packages/memories && npm run verify -w packages/rules
